tiers.name: smoke_syntax_policy_architecture
tiers.purpose: Fast checks that prove basic repo shape, syntax, policy anchors, and report-only boundaries.

tiers.name: impacted_tests
tiers.purpose: Changed-path-driven tests selected by the impacted-test plan without claiming complete proof.

tiers.name: component_integration
tiers.purpose: Component or integration suites relevant to larger or cross-cutting changes.

tiers.name: full_promotion_suite
tiers.purpose: Full discovery, checkpoint, promotion, or release validation with compact telemetry.
